都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. (Check the shop’s account for details!) ≪Shop Information≫ 【Shop Name】Shunyacchan Yatai Ramen 【Address】1277-8 Hatsuzawamachi, Hachioji, Tokyo 【Hours】18:00–23:00 【Closed】Mondays & Sundays   #japanesefood

Drugstore Makeup Tutorial for Oily Skin type 👍🏽 Makeup tips for #oilyskin 👇🏾  - moisturize with oily control cream (oily skin is also dehydrated) - face prep with a matte setting spray and with a thin layer of powder to absorb excess oil and create a matte canvas  - use a soft matte or lumi matte foundation that is not fill coverage  - use matte setting spray BEFORE, DURING AND AFTER MAKEUP - set the face with thin layer of powder (set the blush and bronzer too) - lock in the eyelids with a blurring primer and powder (this will control oil and help mascara not smudge) @CeraVe Oil Control Moisturizing Gel  @loréal paris usa 3 second setting spray and Extentionist mascara  @Milani Cosmetics Mattefying setting spray and concealer + perfect powder  @e.l.f. Cosmetics matte magic mist and set and liquid camo bronzer  @Maybelline NY LUMI Matte foundation and Fit Me Concealer and Fit Me batter + Poreless Pressed Powder @COVERGIRL Trublend skin enhancer blush stick  @NYX Professional Makeup wonder snatch powder  #oilyskinmakeup #makeuptips #drusgtoremakeup #fullfacedrugstoremakeup

A standout shoyu ramen spot in Tokyo. Their signature menu is the “Special Shoyu Ramen.” Built on a chicken-based broth blended with multiple soy sauces, the first sip brings out the richness of chicken oil, deep umami from the soy sauce, and a subtle sweetness. As you continue, the flavors finish clean and balanced. The charcoal-grilled chashu adds a gentle smoky aroma that naturally melts into the broth✨ The straight noodles hold the soup well, delivering its flavor all the way through each bite. The chashu comes in a variety of cuts, each prepared differently—from rich, fatty pieces to lighter, more delicate textures—letting you enjoy a contrast of juiciness and mouthfeel. [Ramen Sakurai 麺屋 さくら井] - Location: 2 Chome-15-27 Kamirenjaku, Mitaka, Tokyo, Japan - Hours: Mon & Sat 11:30 - 15:00 / 18:00 - 20:30, Tue/Thu/Fri 11:30 - 15:00, Sun 11:30 - 16:00 (Closed Wed) - Menu: Special Shoyu Ramen (¥2,000) #ramen #tokyoramen #shoyuramen #라멘

한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

“Dog lovers” vs dog lovers when it comes to greeting dogs! ETA: “dog lovers” could also be replaced with “uniformed, uneducated, and/or inconsiderate dog lovers” vs “informed, educated, and considerate dog lovers” if that makes you more comfortable 🫶 One of my biggest pet peeves is people baby talking to my dog and pretending like I’m interrupting? Bizarre! And in case you didn’t know because it’s something that’s been so normalized, putting your hands in dogs’ faces is unsafe. Dogs don’t need to sniff you up close like that and it’s putting unneeded pressure on them (often leading to bites). The best way to greet a dog is calm, neutral, and honestly just ignoring them. If you want to say hi to a dog, ask the owner first. Try to make yourself small by turning to the side and crouching. Allow the dog to approach you first. Some dogs are super friendly and love people! This doesn’t mean it’s ok to pet or approach without asking their handler! The safest way to greet any dog is by admiring from afar. Admittedly, if I know someone’s dog well, I might be a bit of the former “dog lover” and be excitedly greeting them 😂 It’s different when you know the dog! This reel was very much inspired by @lucysandwick! . . . #DogTraining #doglovers #trainingdogs #corgis #pembrokewelshcorgi

Homemade cheesy beef panini pockets  FILLING: 500g minced beef 1 small onion, diced ½ red bell pepper ½ yellow bell pepper 2 garlic cloves, minced 2 tbsp tomato paste ¼ cup water 2 cups mozzarella Seasonings: Salt, black pepper, smoked paprika, garlic powder, oregano, cayenne, thyme & all-purpose seasoning  DOUGH: 3 cups all purpose Flour 1 tbsp Baking powder 1 tsp Salt 1 tbsp Sugar 1/2-1 cup Milk 2 tbsp oil or melted butter Full recipe + detailed step-by-step instructions will be available in my cookbook soon 👀📖✨ #DinnerIdeas #EasyRecipes #quickrecipes #panini #homecooking

Please tell me I’m not the only one doing this at 2 am 😭 Creamy Cheesy Buldak Ramen 🍜🧀🔥 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1 slice baby Swiss cheese 1 slice American cheese 1 slice Monterey Jack cheese 2 tbsp mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet Chili oil 2 cloves garlic, minced 2 tbsp chopped green onions ½ cup heavy cream or milk Cooked ramen noodles Toppings Fried egg Mini sausages Dumplings Extra green onions Extra chili oil Instructions Cook the Buldak noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside. In a pan over low heat, add the baby Swiss, American, and Monterey Jack cheese slices. Add the mayo, Buldak sauce, Buldak powder, minced garlic, and green onions on top. Mix everything together until the cheese melts into a thick spicy paste. Pour in the heavy cream or milk and stir until smooth and creamy. Add the cooked noodles and toss until fully coated in the sauce. Top with fried egg, dumplings, mini sausages, extra green onions, and more chili oil if desired. You can use any toppings you like 🤤 Enjoy hot and creamy 🍜🔥 #buldak #buldakramen #ramen #Foodie #noodles

Creamy Cheesy Buldak Ramen 🍜🧀🔥 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1 slice baby Swiss cheese 1 slice American cheese 1 slice Monterey Jack cheese 2 tbsp mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet Chili oil 2 cloves garlic, minced 2 tbsp chopped green onions ½ cup heavy cream or milk Cooked ramen noodles Toppings Fried egg Mini sausages Dumplings Extra green onions Extra chili oil Instructions Cook the Buldak noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside. In a pan over low heat, add the baby Swiss, American, and Monterey Jack cheese slices. Add the mayo, Buldak sauce, Buldak powder, chili oil, minced garlic, and green onions on top of the cheese. Mix everything together until the cheese melts into a thick spicy paste. Pour in the heavy cream or milk and stir until smooth and creamy. Add the cooked noodles and toss until fully coated in the sauce. Top with fried egg, dumplings, mini sausages, extra green onions, and more chili oil if desired. Enjoy hot and creamy  #buldak #buldakramen #eat #food  #Foodie

Der brutal getötete Kater aus Tirol hatte einen Namen: „Schmotzer“. Der zutrauliche rote Kater war in Brixen im Thale überall bekannt und beliebt. Jetzt wird bekannt: Ausgerechnet auf dem Hof von zwei Tatverdächtigen fand er sein grausames Ende. Besonders erschütternd: Eine Tierärztin hatte ihn erst kurz zuvor gerettet, kastriert und medizinisch versorgt. Während die Polizei von Reue spricht, zweifeln Tierschützer daran – und berichten von Drohungen gegen den Anzeigensteller. Gleichzeitig wächst die Angst in der Region: Immer mehr Katzen werden vermisst. Die Frage bleibt – war „Schmotzer“ wirklich das einzige Opfer?

도쿄 하면 쇼유라멘, 그중에서도 미슐랭 빕 구르망에 선정된 Ramen Break Beats입니다.  오픈 직후 일본 100대 명점에도 선출되며 국내외로 인기가 많은데요. 보통 이런 곳은 1~2시간씩 웨이팅이 걸리지만, 여긴 예약이 가능한 게 큰 장점! (방법 아래 기재) 대표 메뉴 특상 쇼유 라멘을 주문했습니다. 토종닭으로 깊고 맑은 국물을 우리고 다시마와 버섯을 사용해 감칠맛의 레이어를 더합니다. 한 입 맛보면 연이어 마시게 될 정도로 매력적이에요. 한 그릇에 정말 많은 디테일이 담긴 라멘이에요. 도쿄에서 한번쯤 맛보시길 추천드립니다!  [Ramen Break Beats]  - 위치: Tokyo, Meguro City, Meguro, 4 Chome−21−19 アイビーハイツ 1階 - 영업: 목~일 11:30 - 14:45 / 전석 예약제 - 메뉴: 특상 쇼유 라멘 (2,200엔) #Ramen #라멘 #도쿄맛집 #tokyogourmet

김치찜 어쩌면 마지막이 메인 아닐까요? 📖들어간 재료 -김치 반포기 -5겹살 600g정도(한덩이) -마늘 1숟가락 -고춧가루 1숟가락(색감용) -고추장 1/2숟가락 -간장 1숟가락(색감용) -콜라(500ml, 제로X)   ❗️제일 중요! (사이다도 괜찮아요!) -양파 반개 -대파 1줄 -설탕 1/2숟가락 (양파랑 콜라 넣어서 안넣어도 되는데 넣으면 더 감칠맛나요) 📚나름? 조리 순서 -오겹살 겉면을 찐한 갈색이 나올때까지 먼저 굽기 -아래에 고기기름이 자글자글할 때 김치 통으로 넣기 -김치 한번 뒤집어주고 김치 색깔이 조금 나면 콜라 다 넣기 -물도 500ml같이 넣어주고 끓기 시작하면 나머지 재료 투하 -30분 지나면 고기랑 김치 한번 뒤집어주고 30분 더 끓이기 (중간중간 물이 부족해서 탈 것 같으면 물 계속 추가해주기) -이후에 김치를 고기 위에 올려서 20분 끓이다가 마지막에 뚜껑열고 쫙 쫄여주기 이렇게 만들었어요! #김치찜 #통삼겹김치찜 #한식 #asmr #mukbang

Diese One Pot Ramen Dumpling Suppe ist einfach das perfekte Comfort Food bei Regenwetter 🍜🌶️ Zutaten für 2 Personen: 2 EL rote Currypaste 2 EL Erdnussbutter 2 Knoblauchzehen, gepresst ca. 2–3 cm Ingwer, gerieben (hatte keinen da, aber schmeckt besser mit) 400 ml Kokosmilch 800 ml Gemüsebrühe 1 Stange Zitronengras (optional) 2 EL Sojasauce Saft einer Limette 6 vegetarische Dumplings 200 g Ramen Nudeln 200 g Champignons oder braune Pilze 2 Eier, gekocht und halbiert frischer Koriander/Petersilie schwarzer Sesam Chiliöl zum Servieren #einfacherezepte #feierabendküche #wohlfühlessen #nudelliebe #suppenliebe
